title: Cuneiform Tablet #0570: Middle Assyrian School Tablet
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Assyrian period. School Tablet document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records school tablet matters typical of Middle Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
